creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 226435
v1

Mainly affects GLX on modesetting DDX and xwayland (DRI3). Apparently, required by alacritty. Test with mesa-devel for now.
Alternatively, xorg-server can be updated to 21.1.0 which is likely more risky.

References:
https://lists.freedesktop.org/archives/mesa-dev/2021-May/225249.html
https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/mesa/mesa/-/merge_requests/11693
https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/xorg/xserver/-/merge_requests/706
